text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #1)

Thanks, done.

>     Fixes: 05314f45e1 Add entries from the stable/13/RELNOTES file.

Incidentally, that file does not use the (correctly spelt) word superseded. <https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/RELNOTES?h=stable/13&id=2b3ac10a272150eaf7d185703d9ad341f776afce>
